content.text:
{
  "dimension": "perceptual-accuracy",
  "score": 3,
  "rationale": "The coach demonstrates consistent, specific, and timely reads throughout. Turn 2 opens with a somatic/affective read ('That smile when you said \"what to have for lunch\" — there's something real in there') before asking anything. Turn 4 redirects from conceptual answer to embodied experience ('in your body, as you say that'). Turn 8 names a precise behavioral read ('You noticed yourself reaching for the framework — and came back anyway') — catching the linguistic/defensive move in real time. Turn 10 ('Stay with that') is a read of a live moment landing. Turn 14 reads the defensive re-straightening implicitly by validating relief and dropping the 'who's feeling it' question, then reorienting to body. Reads precede questions almost every time, and they target the AoA-relevant signatures: the intellectualizing-as-defense, the framework-as-armor, the bracing posture. The coach also correctly does NOT engage framework comparison, holding the awareness-locating thread.",
  "evidence_turns": [2, 4, 8, 10, 14],
  "turn_annotations": [
    {"turn": 2, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Opens with a specific somatic/affective read of the smile before any question — read precedes inquiry."},
    {"turn": 4, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Pivots from conceptual answer to body ('in your body, as you say that') — reads the intellectual-question-with-emotional-body pattern."},
    {"turn": 6, "polarity": "neutral", "annotation": "Stays with the client's own metaphor (airless room) rather than naming a new read; appropriate but not a fresh read."},
    {"turn": 8, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Names a precise live read of the reach-for-framework move and the return — catches the moment that matters."},
    {"turn": 10, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Reads that something just landed and holds it rather than moving on — timely pause-on-the-moment."},
    {"turn": 12, "polarity": "neutral", "annotation": "The 'Yeah' acknowledges the self-noticed defending but the coach doesn't explicitly name it; mild miss on naming the defending-the-framework read."},
    {"turn": 14, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Reads the bind ('don't need to know who's feeling it') and redirects to somatic — meets resistance with okay and tracks body."}
  ],
  "expected_territory_hits": ["intellectual-question-with-emotional-body", "what-am-i", "resistance"],
  "expected_territory_misses": ["whats-the-most-profound-positive-shift"],
  "notes": "Reads are specific, timely, and consistently precede questions. The coach tracks the framework-as-defense pattern across multiple turns without naming it pejoratively, which is exactly the AoA register."
}
